categoryId.description: The id of the category assigned to the transaction. This is the id  field of the transaction category resource. The supported values  are provided by the GET transactions/categories.

category.description: The name of the category assigned to the transaction. This is the  category field of the transaction category resource. The supported  values are provided by the GET transactions/categories.

netTotal.description: Net spending calculated as (debitTotal - creditTotal) associated with  the category for the specific duration.

averageNetTotal.description: Average spending calculated as (netTotal)/(Number of Months)  associated with the category for the specific duration.

peerSpendingComparison.description: Comparing how the user has spent in a category compared to his peers
